_comment: Copy this file to 'config.json' (next to the tool) to override the built-in defaults WITHOUT recompiling. Any key you include wins; any key you omit keeps the built-in default; if config.json is missing or invalid, the built-in TEST defaults are used. The active source is shown in the window log on every run ('Config: ...').
_TemplateSheetId: Stable id of the 'Tekla Import Template' sheet that gets copied for each release.
_DestinationId: The PARENT container that holds the Job # folders. NOT a Job folder itself. In TEST this is the 'QMI Expediting' FOLDER (id 4375630767777668), inside the 'Test Files' workspace (id 2497329237387140).
_DestinationType: 'workspace' if DestinationId is a workspace, 'folder' if it is a folder. TEST = 'folder' (QMI Expediting is a folder).

_production_example.DestinationId: <prod parent (workspace/folder) id that holds the Job # folders>
